MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-12-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/STEVE PEACHEE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-12-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/STEVE PEACHEE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
